semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_search
semantic_scholar.description: Search for academic papers using Semantic Scholar API with relevance ranking. Supports various filters including publication types, dates, venues, and fields of study.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

query.description: Text query that will be matched against paper's title and abstract. All terms are stemmed in English. By default all terms in the query must be present in the paper. Example: 'machine learning' or 'covid vaccination'

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The paperId field is always returned. If omitted, only paperId and title will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'authors.name', 'citations.title'. Example: 'title,abstract,year,authors' or 'title,embedding.specter_v2'

publicationTypes.description: Filter by publication types. Use comma-separated list. Options: Review, JournalArticle, CaseReport, ClinicalTrial, Conference, Dataset, Editorial, LettersAndComments, MetaAnalysis, News, Study, Book, BookSection. Example: 'Review,JournalArticle'

openAccessPdf.description: Filter for papers with public PDF. This parameter does not accept any values. Just include the parameter name to enable filtering.

publicationDateOrYear.description: Publication date range in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use <startDate>:<endDate> format. Each term is optional. Examples: '2019-03-05', '2019-03', '2019', '2016-03-05:2020-06-06', '1981-08-25:', ':2015-01', '2015:2020'

venue.description: Publication venues, comma-separated list. Can use ISO4 abbreviations. Examples: 'Nature', 'New England Journal of Medicine', 'Radiology', 'N. Engl. J. Med.'

fieldsOfStudy.description: Fields of study, comma-separated list. Options: Computer Science, Medicine, Chemistry, Biology, Materials Science, Physics, Geology, Psychology, Art, History, Geography, Sociology, Business, Political Science, Economics, Philosophy, Mathematics, Engineering, Environmental Science, Agricultural and Food Sciences, Education, Law, Linguistics. Example: 'Physics,Mathematics'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 100)

total.description: Approximate number of matching search results

next.description: Starting position of the next batch (absent if no more data)

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_bulk_search
semantic_scholar.description: Bulk retrieval of basic paper data without search relevance. Supports boolean logic queries and various filters.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

query.description: Text query with boolean logic support. Supports + for AND, | for OR, - for negation, quotes for phrases, * for prefix matching, ~N for edit distance, and parentheses for precedence. Example: 'machine learning' or 'fish +ladder' or '(fish ladder) | outflow'

token.description: Continuation token for pagination. Provided when original query returns, used to fetch next batch of papers.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The paperId field is always returned. Example: 'title,abstract,year,authors'

sort.description: Sort results by field:order. Options: paperId, publicationDate, citationCount. Default: paperId:asc. Example: 'publicationDate:asc' or 'citationCount:desc'

publicationTypes.description: Filter by publication types. Use comma-separated list. Options: Review, JournalArticle, CaseReport, ClinicalTrial, Conference, Dataset, Editorial, LettersAndComments, MetaAnalysis, News, Study, Book, BookSection. Example: 'Review,JournalArticle'

openAccessPdf.description: Filter for papers with public PDF. This parameter does not accept any values. Just include the parameter name to enable filtering.

publicationDateOrYear.description: Publication date range in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use <startDate>:<endDate> format. Examples: '2019-03-05', '2019-03', '2019', '2016-03-05:2020-06-06'

venue.description: Publication venues, comma-separated list. Can use ISO4 abbreviations. Examples: 'Nature', 'New England Journal of Medicine', 'Radiology'

fieldsOfStudy.description: Fields of study, comma-separated list. Options: Computer Science, Medicine, Chemistry, Biology, Materials Science, Physics, Geology, Psychology, Art, History, Geography, Sociology, Business, Political Science, Economics, Philosophy, Mathematics, Engineering, Environmental Science, Agricultural and Food Sciences, Education, Law, Linguistics. Example: 'Physics,Mathematics'

total.description: Approximate number of matching search results

token.description: Continuation token for next page (present only when more results available)

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_author_papers
semantic_scholar.description: Details about an author's papers. Fetch the papers of an author in batches. Only retrieves the most recent 10,000 citations/references for papers belonging to the batch.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The paperId field is always returned. If omitted, only paperId and title will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'authors.name', 'citations.title'. Example: 'title,abstract,year,authors' or 'url,year,authors'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 1000)

next.description: Starting position of the next batch (absent if no more data)

data.description: List of papers by the author

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_author_search
semantic_scholar.description: Search for authors by name using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

query.description: Search query string for author names. Example: 'adam smith'

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The authorId field is always returned. If omitted, only authorId and name will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'papers.title', 'papers.year'. Example: 'name,url,papers.title,papers.year'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 1000)

next.description: Starting position of the next batch (absent if no more data)

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_get_author
semantic_scholar.description: Details about an author using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The authorId field is always returned. If omitted, only authorId and name will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'papers.title', 'papers.year'. Example: 'name,url,papers.title,papers.year'

output_schema.description: Author object with requested fields

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_get_paper
semantic_scholar.description: Details about a paper using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The paperId field is always returned. If omitted, only paperId and title will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'authors.name', 'citations.title'. Example: 'title,abstract,year,authors'

output_schema.description: Paper object with requested fields

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_authors
semantic_scholar.description: Details about a paper's authors using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The authorId field is always returned. If omitted, only authorId and name will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'papers.title', 'papers.year'. Example: 'name,affiliations,papers.title'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 1000)

next.description: Starting position of the next batch (absent if no more data)

data.description: List of authors of the paper

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_citations
semantic_scholar.description: Details about a paper's citations using Semantic Scholar API. Fetch details about the papers that cite this paper.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. Example: 'contexts,intents,isInfluential,abstract,authors'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 1000)

next.description: Starting position of the next batch (absent if no more data)

data.description: List of citations of the paper

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_references
semantic_scholar.description: Details about a paper's references using Semantic Scholar API. Fetch details about the papers cited by this paper.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. Example: 'contexts,intents,isInfluential,abstract,authors'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 1000)

next.description: Starting position of the next batch (absent if no more data)

data.description: List of references of the paper

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_autocomplete
semantic_scholar.description: Suggest paper query completions using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

query.description: Partial query string for paper title completion. Example: 'semanti'

output_schema.description: List of paper suggestions

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_title_search
semantic_scholar.description: Paper title search using Semantic Scholar API. Retrieves a single paper based on closest title match to given query.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

query.description: Title query string for paper matching. Example: 'Construction of the Literature Graph in Semantic Scholar'

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The paperId field is always returned. If omitted, only paperId and title will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'authors.name', 'citations.title'. Example: 'title,abstract,year,authors'

output_schema.description: Paper object with requested fields and matchScore

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_snippet_search
semantic_scholar.description: Text snippet search using Semantic Scholar API. Return text snippets that most closely match the query.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

query.description: Text query string for snippet search. Example: 'The literature graph is a property graph with directed edges'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 1000)

output_schema.description: List of text snippets

items.description: Snippet object with text, snippetKind, section, annotation data, and score

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_author_batch
semantic_scholar.description: Get details for multiple authors at once using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

ids.description: Array of author IDs to retrieve. Example: ['1741101', '1780531', '48323507']

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The authorId field is always returned. If omitted, only authorId and name will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'papers.title', 'papers.year'. Example: 'name,affiliations,papers.title'

output_schema.description: List of authors with requested fields

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_batch
semantic_scholar.description: Get details for multiple papers at once using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

ids.description: Array of paper IDs to retrieve. Example: ['649def34f8be52c8b66281af98ae884c09aef38b', 'ARXIV:2106.15928']

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. The paperId field is always returned. If omitted, only paperId and title will be returned. Use period (.) for subfields like 'authors.name', 'citations.title'. Example: 'title,abstract,year,authors'

output_schema.description: List of papers with requested fields

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_paper_recommendations
semantic_scholar.description: Get paper recommendations using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

limit.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return (max 500)

output_schema.description: List of recommended papers

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_recommend_papers
semantic_scholar.description: Get paper recommendations using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

limit.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return (max 500)

output_schema.description: List of recommended papers

semantic_scholar.name: semantic_scholar_release_list
semantic_scholar.description: Get release list using Semantic Scholar API.

auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits

output_schema.description: List of releases

arxiv.name: arxiv_search_papers
arxiv.description: Search for academic papers on arXiv using keywords, with support for pagination and sorting.

search_query.description: Search query string. Supports field prefixes like 'ti:' (title), 'au:' (author), 'abs:' (abstract), 'cat:' (category), etc.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

data.description: Raw XML response from ArXiv API

arxiv.name: arxiv_get_papers_by_ids
arxiv.description: Retrieve specific papers from arXiv by their IDs.

id_list.description: Comma-separated list of arXiv paper IDs to retrieve (e.g., '1234.5678,quant-ph/0123456')

data.description: Raw XML response from ArXiv API

arxiv.name: arxiv_search_by_author
arxiv.description: Search for papers by a specific author on arXiv.

search_query.description: Author search query. Use format 'au:author_name' for author search (e.g., 'au:del_maestro')

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

data.description: Raw XML response from ArXiv API

arxiv.name: arxiv_search_by_category
arxiv.description: Search for papers in a specific category on arXiv.

search_query.description: Category search query. Use format 'cat:category_code' for category search (e.g., 'cat:cs.AI', 'cat:math.CO')

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

data.description: Raw XML response from ArXiv API

arxiv.name: arxiv_search_by_date_range
arxiv.description: Search for papers submitted within a specific date range on arXiv.

search_query.description: Date range search query. Use format 'submittedDate:[YYYYMMDDHHMM TO YYYYMMDDHHMM]' (e.g., 'submittedDate:[202301010600 TO 202401010600]'). Can combine with other terms using AND/OR.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

data.description: Raw XML response from ArXiv API

arxiv.name: arxiv_advanced_search
arxiv.description: Perform advanced search queries on arXiv with complex boolean logic and field-specific queries.

search_query.description: Advanced search query with boolean operators (AND, OR, ANDNOT), field prefixes (ti:, au:, abs:, cat:, etc.), quotes for exact phrases, wildcards (*), and parentheses for grouping

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

data.description: Raw XML response from ArXiv API

openalex.name: openalex_search_works
openalex.description: Search for academic works on OpenAlex including journal articles, books, datasets, and theses.

search.description: Search query string for works (searches titles, abstracts, and full text)

output_schema.description: JSON response containing works data

openalex.name: openalex_get_work
openalex.description: Retrieve a specific work from OpenAlex by ID.

work_id.description: OpenAlex work ID (e.g., 'W2741809807' or full URL)

select.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

output_schema.description: JSON response containing work object

select.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

openalex.name: openalex_analyze_text
openalex.description: Analyze text using OpenAlex's aboutness endpoint to identify related topics and concepts. Note: 'text' parameter is automatically mapped to 'title' for API compatibility.

abstract.description: Optional abstract text to analyze alongside the title

output_schema.description: JSON response containing topics, keywords, and confidence scores

crossref.name: crossref_get_work

doi.description: The DOI identifier of the work to retrieve

mailto.description: Email address for polite pool access
